ocr.text: In Q1 2024, Allianz SE reported a total revenue of 150M KRW through direct sales, with 20,000 units sold, representing a
market share of 45%. The brokerage channel contributed premiums collected of 50M KRW, with a growth rate of 12% and
online sales accounting for 60M KRW. In life insurance, a total of 18,000 policies were issued, with claims paid amounting to
2,500 policies and a customer satisfaction rate of 75%. For health insurance, the market growth was recorded at 30M KRW. In
auto insurance, the claim ratio stood at 25%, with 3,200 new customers acquired and a retention rate of 88%. Commercial
insurance policy renewals totaled 950, with a profit margin of 120M KRW.

AutoInsurance  ClaimRatio  NewCustomers  RetentionRate  CommercialInsurance  PolicyRenewals  ProfitMargin
TotalVolume  UnitsSold  Headcount  NumberofBranches  OnlineChannel  BrokerChannel  DirectChannel  Reinsurance  ClaimsFrequency  PoliciesIssued
The overall total volume for 2024 Q1 included 20,000 units sold, with a headcount of 4,000 and a number of branches
amounting to 40. The online channel contributed to 70M KRW, while the broker channel generated 85% of sales through the
direct channel, with reinsurance claims frequency recorded at 18%. The policies issued numbered 25,000, alongside a claims
frequency of 4,500. The remaining financials for 50M KRW revealed 15,000 units sold with a growth rate of 35%, while 35M
KRW indicated 5,200 units sold at an 11% growth rate, and 30M KRW showed 4,000 units sold with a growth rate of 14% and
new customers totaling 1,700.
